name: Export To PPTX
content:
import os
import io
import json
import base64
import re
import datetime
from typing import List, Dict, Any
from pydantic import BaseModel, Field
from pptx import Presentation
from pptx.util import Pt
from pptx.dml.color import RGBColor
from pptx.enum.text import PP_ALIGN, MSO_AUTO_SIZE


class Tools:
    def __init__(self):
        # --- 設定區 ---
        # 這裡填寫你伺服器上允許寫入的實體路徑
        self.output_dir = "/app/backend/data/static/pptx"
        # 這裡填寫使用者存取該目錄的外部 URL (方案一或二提供的網址)
        self.base_url = "https://webui.igis.com.tw/pptx"

        if not os.path.exists(self.output_dir):
            os.makedirs(self.output_dir)

    def generate_presentation(
        self,
        topic: str = Field(..., description="簡報的主題名稱"),
        title: str = Field(..., description="簡報的大標題"),
        subtitle: str = Field(..., description="簡報的副標題"),
        slides_content: str = Field(
            ...,
            description="JSON 格式的幻燈片內容清單。例如：[{'title': '章節標題', 'points': ['要點1', '要點2']}]",
        ),
    ) -> str:
        """
        根據提供的主題、標題和內容清單生成一個 .pptx 簡報檔案。
        """
        try:
            # 解析傳入的 JSON 字串內容
            try:
                content_list = json.loads(slides_content)
            except Exception:
                return "錯誤：slides_content 必須是有效的 JSON 格式清單。"

            ppt = Presentation()

            # 設定背景為黑色 (延續原始範例風格)
            slide_master = ppt.slide_master
            slide_master.background.fill.solid()
            slide_master.background.fill.fore_color.rgb = RGBColor(0, 0, 0)

            # 1. 標題頁
            slide_layout = ppt.slide_layouts[0]
            curr_slide = ppt.slides.add_slide(slide_layout)

            # 設定大標題
            title_shape = curr_slide.shapes.title
            title_shape.text = title
            title_shape.text_frame.auto_size = MSO_AUTO_SIZE.TEXT_TO_FIT_SHAPE
            title_shape.text_frame.paragraphs[0].runs[0].font.color.rgb = RGBColor(
                255, 255, 255
            )

            # 設定副標題
            subtitle_shape = curr_slide.shapes.placeholders[1]
            subtitle_shape.text = subtitle
            subtitle_shape.text_frame.auto_size = MSO_AUTO_SIZE.TEXT_TO_FIT_SHAPE
            subtitle_shape.text_frame.paragraphs[0].runs[0].font.color.rgb = RGBColor(
                255, 255, 255
            )

            # 2. 目錄頁 (Overview)
            slide_layout = ppt.slide_layouts[1]
            curr_slide = ppt.slides.add_slide(slide_layout)
            curr_slide.shapes.title.text = "內容大綱"
            curr_slide.shapes.title.text_frame.paragraphs[0].font.color.rgb = RGBColor(
                255, 255, 255
            )

            tframe = curr_slide.shapes.placeholders[1].text_frame
            tframe.auto_size = MSO_AUTO_SIZE.TEXT_TO_FIT_SHAPE
            for item in content_list:
                para = tframe.add_paragraph()
                para.text = item.get("title", "未命名章節")
                para.level = 0
                para.font.size = Pt(20)
                para.font.color.rgb = RGBColor(255, 255, 255)

            # 3. 內容頁面
            for slide_data in content_list:
                curr_slide = ppt.slides.add_slide(ppt.slide_layouts[1])
                curr_slide.shapes.title.text = slide_data.get("title", "")
                curr_slide.shapes.title.text_frame.auto_size = (
                    MSO_AUTO_SIZE.TEXT_TO_FIT_SHAPE
                )
                curr_slide.shapes.title.text_frame.paragraphs[0].font.color.rgb = (
                    RGBColor(255, 255, 255)
                )

                tframe = curr_slide.shapes.placeholders[1].text_frame
                tframe.auto_size = MSO_AUTO_SIZE.TEXT_TO_FIT_SHAPE

                for point in slide_data.get("points", []):
                    para = tframe.add_paragraph()
                    para.text = point
                    para.level = 1
                    para.font.size = Pt(18)
                    para.font.color.rgb = RGBColor(255, 255, 255)

            # 4. 結尾頁
            curr_slide = ppt.slides.add_slide(ppt.slide_layouts[2])
            thanks_shape = curr_slide.shapes.placeholders[1]
            thanks_shape.text = "感謝聆聽"
            thanks_shape.text_frame.paragraphs[0].font.color.rgb = RGBColor(
                255, 255, 255
            )
            thanks_shape.text_frame.paragraphs[0].font.size = Pt(80)
            thanks_shape.text_frame.paragraphs[0].alignment = PP_ALIGN.CENTER

            # 儲存到記憶體流
            ppt_stream = io.BytesIO()
            ppt.save(ppt_stream)
            ppt_stream.seek(0)

            # --- 存檔與產生連結 ---
            loc_dt = datetime.datetime.today().strftime("%Y%m%d_%H%M%S")
            filename = f"pops_{loc_dt}.pptx"
            file_path = os.path.join(self.output_dir, filename)

            # 儲存檔案
            with open(file_path, "wb") as f:
                f.write(ppt_stream.getbuffer())

            # 回傳 Markdown 格式的連結供使用者下載
            download_url = f"{self.base_url}/{filename}"
            return f"### ✅ 簡報生成成功！\n\n您的大綱已轉換為專業 PPT 檔案。\n\n🔗 **[點擊此處下載簡報]({download_url})**\n\n(檔案已儲存於：{filename})"

        except Exception as e:
            return f"生成 PPT 時發生錯誤: {str(e)}"

specs.name: generate_presentation
specs.description: 根據提供的主題、標題和內容清單生成一個 .pptx 簡報檔案。

slides_content.description: JSON 格式的幻燈片內容清單。例如：[{'title': '章節標題', 'points': ['要點1', '要點2']}]
